title: FIGS Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: FIGS delivered strong Q3 2022 with net revenue growth 25% YoY to $129 million. Gross margin exceeded 70%, adjusted EBITDA margin 16.4%. Active customers grew 24% to 2.2 million on LTM basis. Average order value increased 10% YoY from higher units per transaction and lifestyle offerings. Net revenue per active customer increased $8 to $227. International revenue surged 49%. Lifestyle sales generated 65% growth, reaching 17% of net revenue. Management attributed slowing frequency to inflation pressuring healthcare professionals and underwhelming color launches. Company noted: Recent color launches did not generate typical sales lift. 2022 outlook reduced to approximately $495 million revenue (18% growth) with 16% adjusted EBITDA margin. Q4 expected mid-single-digit growth citing macro pressure and inventory challenges. Strategic initiatives included extending sizes to 3XL-6XL, expanding international presence across 13 countries, enhancing fulfillment, and appointing Sunil Kaki as Chief Marketing Officer.
